description: T3N platform invocation evidence. In live mode all required fields must be present and non-empty. Cryptographic signature verification requires T3N to publish a verifier key or trust anchor.

invocation_id.description: Unique invocation identifier — equals delegation_id from T3N platform receipt

request_digest.description: SHA-256 hex of the canonical request parameters

result_digest.description: SHA-256 hex of the canonical result (e.g. raw invocation receipt bytes)

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp — sourced from authorization_expires_at in T3N receipt

raw_platform_receipt.description: Unmodified T3N API response object — must not be transformed or filtered

platform_credential_fingerprint.description: credential_fingerprint from T3N receipt — proves a real credential was enforced

platform_credential_enforced.description: credential_enforced flag from T3N receipt — must be true in live mode

evidence_mode.description: t3n_attested: full T3N platform evidence; gateway_only: rejected in live; demo: accepted with NON-ATTESTED warning

platform_signature.description: T3N platform signature — required when T3N publishes a signing key (pending trust anchor)

platform_signing_key_id.description: T3N signing key identifier — set when platform_signature is present
